detectors.description:
Reentrancy in ECI._transfer(address,address,uint256) (ECI.sol#665-789):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (ECI.sol#729)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (ECI.sol#803-815)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (ECI.sol#735)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (ECI.sol#823)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (ECI.sol#787)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (ECI.sol#909)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (ECI.sol#889)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (ECI.sol#891)
	ECI._rOwned (ECI.sol#341) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ECI._takeTeam(uint256) (ECI.sol#903-911)
	- ECI._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (ECI.sol#863-899)
	- ECI.balanceOf(address) (ECI.sol#491-495)
	- ECI.constructor() (ECI.sol#425-455)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (ECI.sol#787)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (ECI.sol#917)
	ECI._rTotal (ECI.sol#353) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ECI._getCurrentSupply() (ECI.sol#1059-1069)
	- ECI._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (ECI.sol#915-921)
	- ECI.constructor() (ECI.sol#425-455)
	- ECI.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (ECI.sol#587-609)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [ECI._transfer(address,address,uint256)](ECI.sol#L665-L789):
	External calls:
	- [swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance)](ECI.sol#L729)
		- [uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp)](ECI.sol#L803-L815)
	External calls sending eth:

		- [_marketingAddress.transfer(amount)](ECI.sol#L823)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](ECI.sol#L787)
		- [_rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam)](ECI.sol#L909)
		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](ECI.sol#L889)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](ECI.sol#L891)
	[ECI._rOwned](ECI.sol#L341) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [ECI._takeTeam(uint256)](ECI.sol#L903-L911)
	- [ECI._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](ECI.sol#L863-L899)
	- [ECI.balanceOf(address)](ECI.sol#L491-L495)
	- [ECI.constructor()](ECI.sol#L425-L455)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](ECI.sol#L787)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](ECI.sol#L917)
	[ECI._rTotal](ECI.sol#L353) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [ECI._getCurrentSupply()](ECI.sol#L1059-L1069)
	- [ECI._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](ECI.sol#L915-L921)
	- [ECI.constructor()](ECI.sol#L425-L455)
	- [ECI.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](ECI.sol#L587-L609)
